name: The Sandy Effect
original_name: แซนดี้ ครูแสนดี
overview: Volunteer teacher Sandy believes in the message "no child left behind." She makes it her mission to help her underprivileged young students discover their potential and make sure they don't fall out of the system.

trailers.title: [OFFICIAL TRAILER]  แซนดี้ ครูแสนดี
